subcodes.first_line: O Letter of Nearness! Hearken unto the melodies of the Dove from the Divine Lote-Tree, and cast upon the souls from the verses [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا حرف القرب فاسمع نغمات الورقا من سدره المنتهی و تلقی علی الارواح من آیات
subcodes.subjects: @transcendence; unknowability of God, @The Holy Spirit, @presence of; reunion with God, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
